title: Search capabilities with Admin access
excerpt: As an admin, we are often looking for certain boards within workspaces for a variety of reasons. We should, as admins, be able to at least see all the boards within a Workspace, whether private or not, so we can have a f…

posts.author: Jtattan (Jillian Tattan )
posts.cookedHtml: As an admin, we are often looking for certain boards within workspaces for a variety of reasons. We should, as admins, be able to at least see all the boards within a Workspace, whether private or not, so we can have a full picture. I understand the privacy but I should still be able to see everything. When someone asks me to look at their board for help and not being able to see it without the back and forth of then asking them to send me the link and give me access. I know they have to give me access regardless but we work in so many different time zones so the ability to see everything would help tremendously.
